info.name: DevTracker 2.0 API Collection
info.description: Comprehensive Postman API collection for DevTracker 2.0 enterprise application. Includes 196+ endpoints spanning Authentication, Task Management, Bug Tracking, Sprints, Test Cases, Analytics, Recognition, MFA, Notifications, and Configuration.

item.name: 17. Analytics & Performance Metrics
item.description: Productivity analytics, velocity charts, bug resolution rates, and team metrics.

item.name: 13. File Attachments
item.description: Uploading, downloading, viewing, and deleting file attachments associated with tasks or bugs.

item.name: 22. Audit Groups
item.description: Audit groups, team assignments, and target compliance groups.

item.name: 21. System Audit Logs
item.description: System-wide security and operational audit trail logs.

item.name: 1. Authentication & Session Management
item.description: Endpoints for User Login, Registration, JWT Token Refresh, Logout, Profile Management, and Password operations.

request.description:
Executes authenticateUser operation on /api/auth/login.

**Request Body Type:** `LoginRequest`

Executes setNewPassword operation on /api/auth/set-new-password.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

Executes microsoftLogin operation on /api/auth/microsoft/login.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

Executes forgotPassword operation on /api/auth/forgot-password.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

Executes resetPassword operation on /api/auth/reset-password.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

item.name: 5. Bug & Issue Tracking
item.description: Bug reporting, severity triage, developer fix assignments, tester verification, workflow steps, and mail threads.

request.description:
Executes createBug operation on /api/bugs.

**Request Body Type:** `Bug`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "NullPointerException on Login attempt",
  "description": "User login fails when email has uppercase letters",
  "severity": "CRITICAL",
  "status": "OPEN",
  "taskId": 1,
  "assignedDeveloperId": 2,
  "assignedTesterId": 3,
  "environment": "STAGING"
}

item.name: 6. Bug Review & QA Approvals
item.description: Bug fix review submissions, peer reviews, approval/rejection workflows, and developer summaries.

request.description:
Executes proposeBugReview operation on /api/bug-reviews.

**Request Body Type:** `BugReviewProposedDto`

item.name: 7. Bug Sub-Tasks
item.description: Granular sub-tasks associated with resolving complex bugs.

request.description:
Executes createBugTask operation on /api/bugtasks.

**Request Body Type:** `BugTask`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Fix NullPointerException in login",
  "description": "Ensure email is normalized before query",
  "bugId": 1,
  "assignedUserId": 2,
  "estimatedHours": 4.0
}

item.name: 14. Comments & Collaboration
item.description: Collaborative comments on tasks and bugs for developer-tester communication.

request.description:
Executes addComment operation on /api/comments.

**Request Body Type:** `Comment`

item.name: 26. Application Configuration
item.description: Global system configurations, settings, feature flags, and app parameters.

request.description:
Executes createOrUpdateConfig operation on /api/configs.

**Request Body Type:** `AppConfig`

item.name: 12. Document Management
item.description: Technical documentation, architecture docs, versioning, and document attachments tied to tasks.

request.description: ── UPLOAD ─────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Uploads a document for a CR. Accepts: multipart/form-data with fields: file     — the raw file docType  — BRD | API_DOC | DESIGN | SUPPORT Returns DocumentDto (metadata only — no bytes). Errors: 400 validation, 404 CR not found, 413 too large, 415 bad MIME.
── LIST ───────────────────────────────────────────────────────── Returns metadata list for all non-deleted documents attached to a CR.

── DOWNLOAD (STREAM) ──────────────────────────────────────────── Streams raw bytes with correct Content-Type and Content-Disposition headers. Bytes are never buffered in controller memory — DocumentService writes directly to HttpServletResponse's OutputStream.
Public download endpoint for email clients — permitted via WebSecurityConfig /api/auth/**

item.name: 16. Leaderboards & Rankings
item.description: Developer and tester velocity leaderboards, point rankings, and historical snapshots.

request.description: GET /api/recognition/leaderboard?period=ALL_TIME|MONTHLY|QUARTERLY&size=10 Returns ranked users by total_score descending. Period filtering is handled on the score aggregate — the score row is always "all-time" by spec; period rows are future extension points.
GET /api/recognition/leaderboard/top?limit=5 Quick-access top-N for dashboard widgets (no auth required beyond login).
GET /api/recognition/leaderboard/achievements?limit=10 Users ranked by achievement count (rarity-weighted).

item.name: 2. Multi-Factor Authentication (MFA)
item.description: Endpoints for configuring, enabling, verifying 2FA/MFA via TOTP, managing backup codes and trusted devices.

request.description:
Executes verifyMfa operation on /api/mfa/verify.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

Executes disableMfa operation on /api/mfa/disable.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

Executes verifyBackupCode operation on /api/mfa/backup-codes/verify.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

item.name: 23. Notifications
item.description: Real-time user notifications, unread counts, marking as read, and notification preferences.

request.description:
Creates a notification and immediately pushes it via WebSocket to the target user's active browser sessions.

**Request Body Type:** `Notification`
Mark all notifications for a user as read in one call.

item.name: 18. Quality & Risk Assessment
item.description: Quality risk calculations, risk indicators for software releases, and historical risk trends.

item.name: 15. Developer Gamification & Recognition
item.description: Kudos, developer badges, peer endorsements, achievements, and gamified recognition rewards.

request.description:
POST /api/recognition/admin/grant-achievement Body: { userId, achievementCode, reason } Used for admin-verified achievements (mentoring, certifications, etc.)

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

POST /api/recognition/admin/recalculate/{userId}?suppressEmail=true Forces a full score recalculation for a user (admin only). Use after data migrations or manual corrections. Pass suppressEmail=true to prevent triggering notification emails on unlock.
GET /api/recognition/admin/equity-audit Evaluates Gini coefficient and rank concentration to detect privilege skew or bias.

item.name: 19. Reports & Exports
item.description: Generates PDF, Excel, and CSV summary reports for executive dashboard and sprint summaries.

item.name: 20. Asynchronous Report Jobs
item.description: Asynchronous report generation job scheduling, status polling, and report download links.

item.name: 8. Sprint Management
item.description: Agile sprint creation, backlog planning, sprint tracking, and milestone completion.

request.description:
Executes createSprint operation on /api/sprints.

**Request Body Type:** `Sprint`

item.name: 9. Sprint Tasks & Dependencies
item.description: Tasks tied to specific sprints, task dependency graphs, prerequisite linking, and linking Change Requests (CRs).

request.description:
Executes createSprintTask operation on /api/sprint-tasks.

**Request Body Type:** `SprintTaskDto`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Build Auth Module",
  "description": "Implement JWT and Spring Security integration",
  "assignedUserId": 1,
  "estimatedHours": 16.0,
  "sprintId": 1,
  "priority": "HIGH"
}

item.name: 4. Task Management & Workflows
item.description: Core task lifecycle management: creation, status updates, assigning developers/testers, workflow approvals, and exporting unit test docs.

request.description:
Executes createTask operation on /api/tasks.

**Request Body Type:** `Task`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Implement User Management API",
  "description": "Create CRUD endpoints for user accounts and roles",
  "status": "OPEN",
  "priority": "HIGH",
  "type": "FEATURE",
  "assignedUserId": 2,
  "sprintId": 1,
  "estimatedHours": 8.0
}

item.name: GET /api/tasks/current - Get tasks by step type
25. Task Types
item.description: Custom task types (Feature, Bug, CR, Refactor, Maintenance) definitions.

request.description:
Executes createTaskType operation on /api/task-types.

**Request Body Type:** `TaskType`

item.name: 10. Test Cases & Execution
item.description: Test case definitions, execution statuses, and association with developer tasks or reported bugs.

request.description:
Executes createTestCase operation on /api/test-cases.

**Request Body Type:** `TestCase`

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Verify Login with Valid Credentials",
  "description": "User enters correct username and password and clicks submit",
  "expectedResult": "User receives 200 OK and valid JWT token",
  "taskId": 1,
  "status": "PASSED"
}

item.name: 11. Tester Workspace
item.description: Dedicated workbench for QA Testers to review pending items, log test results, and track testing metrics.

item.name: 3. User Management
item.description: Endpoints for querying system users, profiles, role assignments, and team member management.

request.description:
Executes updateProfile operation on /api/users/profile.

**Request Body Type:** `ProfileUpdateRequest`

Executes updateTheme operation on /api/users/theme.

**Request Body Type:** `Map<String,`

item.name: 24. Workflow Definitions
item.description: Configurable workflow pipeline definitions, steps, and process types.

request.description:
Executes createWorkflow operation on /api/workflows.

**Request Body Type:** `Workflow`
